Dozens of boats cruised along the Seine River in Paris on Monday as part of a rehearsal for the opening ceremony of the upcoming Olympic Games.

For the first time during a summer edition of the Olympics, the opening ceremony will take place outside of the main stadium, with Paris organizers putting together a special program for the July 26 event, taking in many sights across the French capital.
